case_title: AMERICAN EXPRESS NATIONAL BANK VS. DON DAVES-ROUGUEAUX ET AL

docket_entries.description: EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF AMERICAN EXPRESS NATIONAL BANK AS TO DEFENDANT DAVES-ROUGUEAUX, DON AKA DON ROGEAUX DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  AUG-26-2019

SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT (TRANSACTION ID # 100043459), PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF AMERICAN EXPRESS NATIONAL BANK SERVED MAR-19-2019, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON, MAILING DATE MAR-19-2019 AS TO DEFENDANT DAVES-ROUGUEAUX, DON AKA DON ROGEAUX

DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE OF COMPLAINT (TRANSACTION ID # 63277105) AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 TO 10
